creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is actually not a bug. 

This feature is gone now.  A diagnostic shell is started on VTY4 as 
soon as it's safe to start one, and ESC was a poor choice for shell 
execution.  Now ESC is synonymous for "Cancel". 

Bug in usage.hlp documentation:  Fixed.
